sections.title: Attempting enter the Mining Guild without 60 Mining

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: Sorry, but you're not experienced enough to go in there.

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: Welcome to the Mining Guild. Can I help you with anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you got in the guild?

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: All sorts of things! There's plenty of coal rocks along with some iron, mithril and adamantite as well.

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: Deeper in the guild you'll find even more rocks including some runite! The best bit though is our amethyst mine, the only one in the land!

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: There's no better mining site anywhere!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you dwarves do with the ore you mind?

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: What do you think? We smelt it into bars, smith the metal to make armour and weapons, then we exchange them for goods and services.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't see many dwarves selling armour or weapons here.

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: No, this is only a mining outpost. We dwarves don't much like to settle in human cities. Most of the ore is carted off to Keldagrim, the great dwarven city. They've got a special blast furnace up there - it makes

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: smelting the ore so much easier. There are plenty of dwarven traders working in Keldagrim. Anyway, can I help you with anything else?

sections.title: Attempting to go into the members' area of the guild on a free-to-play world

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: Sorry, but you're not allowed in there.

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: Nothing that you're allowed to see I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: This leads deeper into the guild. Through here you'll find even more rocks including runite and amethyst!
